_comment: Known axe a11y violations. Keyed by pageKey:ruleId. This baseline lets CI catch NEW regressions without failing on documented existing debt. Regenerate by running the a11y spec with A11Y_UPDATE_BASELINE=1.

home-en:heading-order.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct

editor-en:aria-required-children.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them

editor-en:label.description: Ensure every form element has a label

editor-en:nested-interactive.description: Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies

editor-en:region.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

editor-en:skip-link.description: Ensure all skip links have a focusable target

login-en:region.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

login-en:skip-link.description: Ensure all skip links have a focusable target

editor-ar:aria-required-children.description: Ensure elements with an ARIA role that require child roles contain them

editor-ar:label.description: Ensure every form element has a label

editor-ar:nested-interactive.description: Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies

editor-ar:region.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

editor-ar:skip-link.description: Ensure all skip links have a focusable target

login-ar:region.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

login-ar:skip-link.description: Ensure all skip links have a focusable target

mobile-editor-en:page-has-heading-one.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading

mobile-editor-en:region.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks

mobile-editor-en:skip-link.description: Ensure all skip links have a focusable target
